items.title: Inflation cooled in January, dropping to lowest level in 9 months
items.description: Affordability remains a top concern for many Americans.

items.title: Nancy Guthrie kidnapping suspect: What we know
items.description: More information is coming to light about the unidentified person who kidnapped 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, mom of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

items.title: WATCH:  Advice from seniors for Valentine's Day
items.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to four couples who've been together for a combined 200 years about the secrets to a lasting and loving relationship.

items.title: WATCH:  Huge sinkhole opens in Shanghai, China
items.description: The hole emerged amid metro excavations in the city.

items.title: WATCH:  Construction worker captures huge double-bodied plane's flyby
items.description: The aircraft, a Stratolaunch Roc, has the world's largest wingspan of 385 feet
